de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

    public interface Feature
    A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.

    • Method Detail

      • computeCost

        RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app,
                        PosInOccurrence pos,
                        Goal goal)
        Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).
